name: Qardan the Clear-Sighted
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>賢</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>瑞</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ずい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>官</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>カルダーン
desc: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can Set 1 Continuous Trap from your hand or GY. It can be activated this turn. If this card is sent to the GY: You can activate this effect; face-up Traps you control cannot be destroyed by your opponent's card effects, until the end of the next turn.
mnst_eff: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can Set 1 Continuous Trap from your hand or GY. It can be activated this turn. If this card is sent to the GY: You can activate this effect; face-up Traps you control cannot be destroyed by your opponent's card effects, until the end of the next turn.
eff: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can Set 1 Continuous Trap from your hand or GY. It can be activated this turn. If this card is sent to the GY: You can activate this effect; face-up Traps you control cannot be destroyed by your opponent's card effects, until the end of the next turn.

mst: Allows activation of Trap Cards the turn they were Set
Cannot be destroyed by card effects
